title: Charged twice after upgrading plan
body: I switched from Starter to Pro and got billed for both tiers this month. Please reverse the duplicate charge.

title: Search times out on large projects
body: Search takes over 30 seconds and often fails when our project has more than 10k files. This blocks support during incidents.

title: Need VAT invoice fields on receipts
body: Our finance team needs VAT number and legal entity address shown on all receipts for compliance.

title: Intermittent login loop on SSO
body: Users get redirected back to login several times before entering the dashboard. Happens mostly after idle sessions.
